message:
🌱 Add langflow: LangSmith Prompt Hub component mission (#861)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "langflow-2822-component-for-interacting-with-langsmith-prompt-hub",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "langflow: Component for interacting with LangSmith Prompt Hub",
+    "description": "Component for interacting with LangSmith Prompt Hub. Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current langflow setup",
+        "description": "Verify your langflow version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show langflow | grep Version\n```\nThis feature requires a working langflow installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the feature request",
+        "description": "Users requested a component that interacts with the LangSmith Prompt Hub, similar to a regular prompt component but using the `ChatPromptTemplate` class to pull prompt templates from LangSmith. The component accepts a LangChain API key and a prompt template name."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the LangSmith Prompt Hub component",
+        "description": "The fix adds a new component that looks up prompt templates from the LangSmith Hub:\n```python\nStrInput(\n    name=\"langsmith_prompt\",\n    display_name=\"LangSmith Prompt\",\n    info=\"The LangSmith prompt to use.\",\n    value=\"efriis/my-first-prompt\",\n),\n```\nThe component pulls the prompt template using:\n```python\n# Pull a public prompt from LangChain Hub\npublic_prompt = hub.pull(self.langsmith_prompt)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the LangSmith Prompt Hub component appears in Langflow and can successfully pull prompt templates."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added a LangSmith Prompt Hub component that allows users to input a LangChain API key and pull prompt templates from the LangSmith Hub for use in Langflow flows.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "StrInput(\n    name=\"langsmith_prompt\",\n    display_name=\"LangSmith Prompt\",\n    info=\"The LangSmith prompt to use.\",\n    value=\"efriis/my-first-prompt\",\n),",
+        "# Pull a public prompt from LangChain Hub\npublic_prompt = hub.pull(self.langsmith_prompt)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "langflow",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "langflow"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/issues/2822",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/pull/2990"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "pip",
+      "python"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Optionally Docker for containerized deployment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:48:13.779Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
